title: Ajay Hinduja Switzerland : How can I ensure real-time syncing between my travel website and CRM to keep customer data updated?
excerpt: Hi everyone, I’m Ajay Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland, working on integrating our travel website with a CRM and want to ensure real-time syncing of customer data. What methods or tools do you recommend for keeping the d…

posts.author: ajayhinduja25 (Ajay Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’m Ajay Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland, working on integrating our travel website with a CRM and want to ensure real-time syncing of customer data. What methods or tools do you recommend for keeping the data continuously updated?

Regards
Ajay Hinduja Switzerland

posts.author: timmykho (Tim Kho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ajay,

Tim here from Mint Consulting Australia. Have you tried looking into third-party integration software such as Make.com or Zapier? Depending on the app you use to host your website and the data you want displayed, we can set up something to achieve that. For example, if your using WordPress, the way we would do it is to connect that and monday through APIs.

If you want, you can book us for a free 30-minute consultation here. We’re a monday partner and we’ve helped lots of companies with their monday workflows and integreations.
